title: Opinion: Opinion | India's Oil Reserves: How Long Can They Last As Iran War Continues?
summary_full: From a future energy security perspective, India will have to significantly enhance its SPR capacities from 17 days to a minimum of 45 days on land, with the possibility of another 10-15 days of SPR on sea on tankers.
summary_public: From a future energy security perspective, India will have to significantly enhance its SPR capacities from 17 days to a minimum of 45 days on land, with the possibility of another 10-15 days of SPR on sea on tankers.

IR.label: neutral
